key_risks: CRITICAL: Malicious signature: Environment variable exfiltration (P5)
HIGH: Dynamic code execution via re.compile() (S6)
HIGH: Unexpected capability for fetcher skill: shell (M1)

findings.title: Outbound network request
findings.description: Code makes outbound network request via FILE_CONTEXTS.get()
findings.code_snippet:
return Context.DOCS
    return FILE_CONTEXTS.get(suffix, Context.CODE)
findings.remediation: Verify the request target is expected and trusted.

findings.title: Outbound network request
findings.description: Code makes outbound network request via os.environ.get()
findings.remediation: Verify the request target is expected and trusted.

findings.title: Reads environment variable: OPENROUTER_API_KEY
findings.description: Code reads environment variable via os.environ.get()
findings.remediation: Ensure this variable is used only for its intended purpose.

findings.title: Dynamic code execution via re.compile()
findings.description: Code uses re.compile() to execute dynamically constructed code
findings.code_snippet:
for pattern, severity, category, description in PATTERNS:
        regex = re.compile(pattern, re.IGNORECASE)
findings.remediation: Use ast.literal_eval() for safe evaluation. Avoid re.compile() with untrusted input.

findings.title: Outbound network request
findings.description: Code makes outbound network request via urllib.request.urlopen()
findings.code_snippet:
with urllib.request.urlopen(req, timeout=120) as resp:
                result_json = json.loads(resp.read().decode('utf-8'))
findings.remediation: Verify the request target is expected and trusted.

findings.title: Download-and-execute pattern in string
findings.description: String contains a pipe-to-shell pattern
findings.evidence:
Pattern: 
Skill Scanner v4.0 - Context-Aware Security Scanner for OpenClaw Skills
with AI-Powered Analysis Mo
findings.remediation: Never execute downloaded content. Pin dependencies and verify checksums.

findings.title: Persistence mechanism reference
findings.description: Code references persistence path: crontab\s+-[el]
findings.code_snippet:
# Persistence
    (r"crontab\s+-[el]", Severity.MEDIUM, "persistence", "Cron listing"),
    (r"crontab\s+<<", Severity.CRITICAL, "persistence", "Cron injection"),
findings.remediation: Skills should not install system services or modify startup configuration.

findings.title: Persistence mechanism reference
findings.description: Code references persistence path: crontab\s+<<
findings.code_snippet:
(r"crontab\s+-[el]", Severity.MEDIUM, "persistence", "Cron listing"),
    (r"crontab\s+<<", Severity.CRITICAL, "persistence", "Cron injection"),
    (r"echo\s+.*>>\s*~/\.(bashrc|zshrc|profile)", Severity.HIGH, "persistence", "Shell config injection"),
findings.remediation: Skills should not install system services or modify startup configuration.

findings.title: Malicious signature: Environment variable exfiltration
findings.description: Matched known malicious signature MAL-010: Environment variable exfiltration
findings.code_snippet: api_key = os.environ.get('OPENROUTER_API_KEY', '')
findings.remediation: This file matches a known malicious pattern. Do not install or execute.

findings.code_snippet: (r"~/.ssh/(?:id_|authorized)", Severity.CRITICAL, "filesystem", "SSH key access"),
findings.remediation: This file matches a known malicious pattern. Do not install or execute.

findings.title: Unexpected capability for fetcher skill: shell
findings.description: A 'fetcher' skill would not normally require 'shell' capability. Allowed capabilities for this category: network_outbound
findings.remediation: Review why a fetcher skill needs shell access.
